regexCodeList.string: ^You raise a level\! You are now level ([0-9]+)\.$

Script.name: Bypass_Script
Script.script:
Bypass = Bypass or {}
local function bypass_note(msg) if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho("<gold>[Bypass] <white>" .. msg .. "\n") elseif type(echo) == "function" then echo("[Bypass] " .. msg .. "\n") end end
local function format_bypass_shortname(area_code) local code = tostring(area_code or "") if code == "" then return code end if string.len(code) <= 4 then return string.upper(code) end return (code:gsub("(%a)([%w']*)", function(first, rest) return string.upper(first) .. string.lower(rest) end)) end
local function gmcp_get(path) local node = gmcp for part in string.gmatch(path, "[^%.]+") do if type(node) ~= "table" then return nil end node = node[part] end return node end
local function to_num(v) local n = tonumber(v) if not n then return 0 end return n end
local function get_slots() local slots = 2 local subclass = tostring(gmcp_get("char.base.subclass") or "") if subclass == "Navigator" then slots = slots + 2 end
local int_plus_wis = to_num(gmcp_get("char.stats.int")) + to_num(gmcp_get("char.stats.wis")) if int_plus_wis >= 800 then slots = slots + 1 end
return slots end
local function run_bypass_commands(commands) Bypass.bypassed_areas = {} Bypass.bypassed_lookup = {} if Bypass.summary_timer then killTimer(Bypass.summary_timer) Bypass.summary_timer = nil end
send("bypass clear", false) for _, cmd in ipairs(commands) do send("bypass " .. cmd, false) end end
local function report_bypass_summary() local list = Bypass.bypassed_areas or {} if #list == 0 then return end
local summary = table.concat(list, ", ") if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho(string.format("<ansiCyan>[INFO] <white>You are now bypassing %d areas: %s\n", #list, summary)) elseif type(echo) == "function" then echo(string.format("[INFO] You are now bypassing %d areas: %s\n", #list, summary)) end end
local function commands_for_level(level, slots) if level >= 2 and level <= 14 then if slots == 4 then return { "graveyard", "gauntlet", "chessboard", "maelstrom" } end return { "graveyard", "gauntlet" } elseif level >= 15 and level <= 29 then if slots == 4 then return { "gauntlet", "kul tiras", "chessboard", "maelstrom" } end return { "gauntlet", "kul tiras" } elseif level >= 30 and level <= 39 then if slots == 4 then return { "kingsholm", "dsr", "verume", "maelstrom" } end return { "kingsholm", "dsr" } elseif level >= 40 and level <= 54 then if slots == 4 then return { "kingsholm", "zangar", "citadel", "maelstrom" } end return { "kingsholm", "zangar" } elseif level >= 55 and level <= 59 then if slots == 4 then return { "zangar", "gold rush", "citadel", "uplanes" } end return { "zangar", "gold rush" } elseif level >= 60 and level <= 69 then if slots == 4 then return { "upper planes", "flying citadel", "goldrush", "lplanes" } end return { "upper planes", "flying citadel" } elseif level >= 70 and level <= 99 then if slots == 4 then return { "lower planes", "upper planes", "goldrush", "citadel" } end return { "lower planes", "upper planes" } elseif level >= 100 and level <= 114 then if slots == 4 then return { "xyl", "halls of the damned", "deathtrap", "talsa" } end return { "xyl", "halls of the damned" } elseif level >= 115 and level <= 119 then if slots == 4 then return { "xyl", "deathtrap dungeon", "damned", "talsa" } end return { "xyl", "deathtrap dungeon" } elseif level >= 120 and level <= 129 then if slots == 4 then return { "talsa", "deathtrap dungeon", "ftii", "horath" } end return { "talsa", "deathtrap dungeon" } elseif level >= 130 and level <= 139 then if slots == 4 then return { "deathtrap dungeon", "zyian", "masquerade", "ftii" } end return { "deathtrap dungeon", "zyian" } elseif level >= 140 and level <= 149 then if slots == 4 then return { "cougarian", "cataclysm", "masquerade", "ftii" } end return { "cougarian", "cataclysm" } elseif level >= 150 and level <= 174 then if slots == 4 then return { "cataclysm", "cougarian", "deadlights", "helegear" } end return { "cataclysm", "cougarian" } elseif level >= 175 and level <= 179 then if slots == 4 then return { "deadlights", "cataclysm", "cougarian", "helegear" } end return { "deadlights", "cataclysm" } elseif level >= 180 and level <= 200 then if slots == 4 then return { "partroxis", "nine hells", "deadlights", "helegear", "cougarian" } end return { "partroxis", "nine hells" } elseif level == 201 then if slots == 4 then return { "partroxis", "nine hells", "deadlights", "wyrm", "cougarian" } end return { "partroxis", "nine hells" } end
return nil end
function Bypass_ApplyLevel(level) local commands = commands_for_level(level, get_slots()) if not commands then return end
run_bypass_commands(commands) end
function Bypass_ApplyCurrentLevel() local level = to_num(gmcp_get("char.base.level")) if level <= 0 then bypass_note("No GMCP level yet. Try again after score/level data arrives.") return end
Bypass_ApplyLevel(level) end
function Bypass_OnLevelUp(matches) local level = to_num(matches[2]) if level <= 0 then return end
Bypass_ApplyLevel(level) end
function Bypass_OnBypassLine(matches) local short_name = format_bypass_shortname(matches[3]) if short_name ~= "" then Bypass.bypassed_areas = Bypass.bypassed_areas or {} Bypass.bypassed_lookup = Bypass.bypassed_lookup or {} if not Bypass.bypassed_lookup[short_name] then table.insert(Bypass.bypassed_areas, short_name) Bypass.bypassed_lookup[short_name] = true end end
if Bypass.summary_timer then killTimer(Bypass.summary_timer) end Bypass.summary_timer = tempTimer(0.35, function() Bypass.summary_timer = nil report_bypass_summary() end)
deleteLine() end
bypass_note("Loaded. Use 'bypass apply' to apply bypasses for current level.")
